mapper.sql: id, task_type, business_type, file_name, file_url, status, total_count, success_count, failure_count, error_message, tenant_id, created_by, created_time, updated_by, updated_time, deleted, version
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_import_export_task SET task_type = #{taskType}, business_type = #{businessType}, file_name = #{fileName}, file_url = #{fileUrl}, status = #{status}, total_count = #{totalCount}, success_count = #{successCount}, failure_count = #{failureCount}, error_message = #{errorMessage}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_time = #{updatedTime}, version = #{version} + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE AND version = #{version}
mapper.delete: UPDATE sys_import_export_task SET deleted = TRUE WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_import_export_task WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = FALSE
